alerts.headline: 📉 RSI APPROACHING OVERSOLD: Gold RSI at 30.9 — historically precedes mean-reversion bounces
alerts.detail: RSI in the 30-40 range has historically preceded gold price rebounds. Watch for a reversal signal. Current RSI: 30.9

alerts.headline: ⚠️ BELOW 50-DAY MA: Gold at $4,513 trading under 50-DMA ($4,629) — watch for support
alerts.detail: Price below 50-day moving average can signal short-term bearish momentum.

alerts.headline: 🟡 ATH PULLBACK: Gold is 15.1% below its all-time high of $5,318 — historically a re-entry zone
alerts.detail: Gold set its ATH of $5,318 on 2026-01-29. Pullbacks of 8-20% below ATH have historically been strong accumulation opportunities in bull markets.
